name: langchain.retriever
description: LC retrieval. Captured by the SDK callback handler's `on_retriever_start` (Python) / `handleRetrieverStart` (TS), persisted as its own trace row so reviewers can audit which queries returned which documents. Input is `{query, serialized, retriever?, parent_run_id?}` — `query` is the raw retrieval query, `serialized` is LC's dump of the retriever (vector store, BM25, hybrid, etc.). Output is `{documents: [Document], count: N}` where each Document has `{page_content, metadata: {source, ...}}`.

documents.page_content: Quiet hours at Maple Ridge run from 10pm to 8am on weekdays and 11pm to 9am on weekends.
Tenants are responsible for ensuring guests respect quiet hours.
Repeated noise complaints can lead to formal warnings or lease termination.
